message:
test(metrics,sharding): add 22 metrics tests and 22 sharding tests for type/rendering/routing edge cases

metrics.rs: Add non-feature-gated pure_tests module with 22 tests covering
MetricsSnapshot/EventBusSnapshot defaults, Prometheus rendering (prefix,
sanitization, HELP/TYPE lines, event bus inclusion/exclusion, native output
metrics, db write age None/-1), format_float edge cases (NaN, infinity),
sanitize_prefix, is_localhost_bind, metric_name with/without prefix.

sharding.rs: Add 22 tests for encode/decode edge cases (shard 0, max shard,
max local, overflow masking), is_sharded_pane_id, ShardId Display/serde/ordering,
AssignmentStrategy default/serde/ByDomain/ConsistentHash, assign with empty
shards, ShardHealthReport (all healthy, mixed, serde), infer_agent_type from
title, circuit_state_rank ordering, normalize_domain.

Contributes to wa-1u90p.7.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
